name: SPIE SA
summary: SPIE SA provides multi-technical services in the areas of energy and communications. The company operates through four segments: France; Germany and Central Europe; North-Western Europe; and Oil & Gas and Nuclear. It offers mechanical, electrical, and heating, ventilation, and air conditioning (HVAC) engineering services; design, installation, maintenance, and reconstruction services for office, logistic, industrial, and retail facilities; and design, construction, implementation, operation, and maintenance services for technical facilities, such as energy and digital networks, transport and mobility, infrastructure, industrial buildings, and city services. The company is also involved in the provision of technical facility management; energy-efficiency solutions; technical services for the transmission and distribution of energy and for industrial clients, as well as in the areas of electrical and security, HVAC, and information and communications technology; and building maintenance, consulting, facility management, and electricity and automation services. In addition, it engages in the installation work of industrial electricity, industrial refrigeration, ironwork, and wine production processes; production of automated industrial equipment for materials handling; and provides IT consulting, integration, and maintenance, as well as ICT services and solutions. Further, the company offers well delivery and management; project, engineering, and construction; assessment and competency development; commissioning and start up; and operation, maintenance, and asset integrity services for oil and gas sector. SPIE SA was founded in 1900 and is headquartered in Cergy-Pontoise, France.
